study_title: Larval pheromones regulate gene expression related to foraging task specialization in honey bees
exp_title: RNA-seq of Apis mellifera, nectar forager exposed to control pheromone, a mineral oil
design: 50bp single-end RNA-seq data. Sequenced on Illumina HiSeq4000 using Poly A enrichment. Samples were multiplexed and all samples were sequenced in each for four lanes, generating four technical replicates each.
